title: Dynamic preload selection
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.get_user/2` that takes an id and a keyword list of options. If `include: :posts` is in the options, preload `:posts`. If `include: :profile` is in the options, preload `:profile`. If neither, don't preload. Use a base query and conditionally add preloads — either by building a list of preloads or by piping through conditional `preload/2` calls. Pin id. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Combines preload + dynamic selection. Less common pattern.
